title: Ultratrain: The Movie
description: In the first Ultratrain movie, our hero faces off with his nemesis Trainiac and the stakes are higher than ever.
quote: The canyon”s wide and deep, but I’m going to make this dangerous leap!
altHero: Ultratrain, a red and gold train engine, and Trainiac, a purple one
alt2: Ultratrain and Trainiac separated by a canyon
alt4: Trainiac’s head spinning as Ultratrain passes him by
